recommendations.title: The New Kids
recommendations.overview: A brother and his young sister come to a small town to find out a local gang terrorizes the population.

recommendations.title: Friday the 13th
recommendations.overview: Camp counselors are stalked and murdered by an unknown assailant while trying to reopen a summer camp that was the site of a child's drowning.

recommendations.title: DeepStar Six
recommendations.overview: The crew of an experimental underwater nuclear base are forced to struggle for their lives when their explorations disturb a creature who threatens to destroy their base.

recommendations.title: Pawn
recommendations.overview: A petty robbery spirals into a tense hostage situation after three gunmen hold up a diner that's a front for the mob.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Deadly Prey

recommendations.title: Hustle

recommendations.title: God's Not Dead: We The People
recommendations.overview: Reverend Dave has to defend himself and a group of Christian homeschooling families after an inspection by local government officials.

recommendations.title: Spielberg
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.
